description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a rectangular, metallic head featuring prominent beveled edges and a series of raised studs along the top. The head is thick and blocky, with reinforced side panels that add to its robust appearance. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and segmented, likely made of metal, with visible bands that may provide additional grip or structural reinforcement. The overall finish is a weathered, matte gray, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. The hammer's proportions and construction indicate it is designed for heavy impact tasks, such as breaking concrete or driving stakes. No visible branding, markings, or accessories are present on the hammer.
description: A large, blocky sledgehammer with a metallic, studded head and a segmented, straight metal handle, finished in weathered gray.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, rectangular striking face of the hammer head with raised studs and reinforced side panels.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thick, rectangular profile of the head and the straight, segmented handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the flat back of the hammer head and the same studded, reinforced design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view matches view 1, showing the solid, blocky side of the head and the cylindrical handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical metal handle with segmented bands for grip enhancement; appears robust and industrial.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head with flat striking faces, beveled edges, and raised studs along the top; reinforced side panels.
